title: OJS Job Progress
description: Schema for job progress reporting in OJS. Workers report progress updates during job execution to provide visibility into long-running jobs. At least one of 'progress' or 'data' MUST be present in an update.

progressUpdate.title: Progress Update Request
progressUpdate.description: Request body for PUT /ojs/v1/jobs/{id}/progress. At least one of 'progress' or 'data' MUST be present.

progress.title: Numeric Progress
progress.description: Numeric progress percentage. MUST be in the range [0.0, 1.0]. Values outside this range are clamped. MUST be monotonically non-decreasing — backends SHOULD reject updates where the new value is less than the current value.

data.title: Structured Progress Data
data.description: Arbitrary JSON object with application-specific progress details. RECOMMENDED maximum size is 4 KB. Backends MAY reject payloads exceeding their configured limit.

checkpoint.title: Checkpoint Data
checkpoint.description: Optional state data for resumable jobs. Stored alongside progress for recovery purposes.

progress.title: Numeric Progress
progress.description: Current numeric progress or null if not yet reported.

data.title: Structured Progress Data
data.description: Current structured progress data or null if not yet reported.

updated_at.title: Last Updated
updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last progress update in RFC 3339 format.
